hook: Dating apps work better when you use them intentionally instead of continuously.
body: Short, focused sessions help you stay discerning while constant grazing turns dating into background static.

hook: Mindless swiping can make you feel active while quietly training shallow attention and weak decision-making.
body: Treat the app like a tool you enter on purpose, not a mood regulator you reach for automatically.

hook: Treat the app like a tool you enter on purpose, not a mood regulator you reach for automatically.
body: Checking twice a day with real focus often produces better conversations than drifting in and out all evening.

body: Set a small window for app use and leave when your attention stops feeling sharp.
